channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Coco Gauff starts her Australian Open with a straight-sets win over Sofia Kenin
item.description: Third-seeded Coco Gauff has opened her Australian Open with a 6-3, 6-3 win over 2020 champion Sofia Kenin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Turning the page: Eagles receiver A.J. Brown reads inspirational book on sideline during playoff win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — A.J. Brown had a novel ideal to pass time on the bench during Philadelphia's wild-card playoff game. The Eagles wide receiver passed on the playbook and checked out an inspirational title — Brown casually flipped through the pages of “Inner Excellence” by Jim Murphy.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Pacers end NBA-leading Cavaliers' winning streak at 12 with 108-93 victory
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Andrew Nembhard scored 19 points, Pascal Siakam had 18 points and nine rebounds and the Indiana Pacers ended NBA-leading Cleveland's winning streak at 12 games, beating the Cavaliers 108-93 on Sunday night. The teams will complete the home-and-home set Tuesday night in Indianapolis.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN DULIK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles handle Packers in Wild Card Round to move on in NFL playoffs
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles are flying high, as they took down the Green Bay Packers in their wild-card matchup to move on to the Divisional Round in the NFL playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Fired US Center for SafeSport investigator arrested on new charges
item.description: DENVER (AP) — An ex-cop fired from his job as an investigator at the U.S. Center for SafeSport for allegedly stealing money seized at a drug bust has been arrested again, this time charged with rape and sex trafficking.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina puts clamps on Madison Booker, routs No. 5 Texas 67-50 for 11th straight win
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Te-Hina Paopao and Chloe Kitts each scored 11 points, and No. 2 South Carolina rolled past No. 5 Texas 67-50 for its 11th straight win on Sunday in front of a sold out crowd of 18,000 at Colonial Life Arena.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Clippers, Lakers to resume their wildfire-delayed schedules on Monday
item.description: NBA games are scheduled to return to wildfire-ravaged Los Angeles on Monday night, with the Clippers planning to resume their schedule when they host the Miami Heat and the Lakers set to host Victor Wembanyama and the San Antonio Spurs.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tottenham avoids massive FA Cup shock with extra-time win as Man United beats Arsenal on penalties
item.description: Tottenham endured the humiliation of being taken to extra time by Tamworth, an opponent nearly 100 places lower in English soccer’s pyramid, before winning 3-0 and avoiding one of the biggest shocks in FA Cup history on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Irish OL Anthonie Knapp won't play in CFP championship game; Buckeyes CB Denzel Burke good to go
item.description: Notre Dame's Anthonie Knapp has been ruled out of the College Football Playoff championship game against Ohio State with an ankle injury, but coach Marcus Freeman said Sunday Rocco Spindler is on track to play.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hady Habib becomes the first man representing Lebanon to win a Grand Slam singles match
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Hady Habib's history-making run at the Australian Open will continue after the first man to represent Lebanon in a Grand Slam singles tournament in the Open era became the first to win a match, defeating Bu Yunchaokete of China 7-6 (4), 6-4, 7-6 (6) on Sunday in front of
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Derrick Henry, Ravens run wild for win over Steelers in NFL playoffs
item.description: The Baltimore Ravens ran all over the Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night to advance to the divisional round of the NFL playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears interview Mike Vrabel for head coaching position; Iowa State's Matt Campbell also comes up, report says
item.description: The Bears interviewed former Tennessee Titans head coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job on Wednesday, which was not unexpected. But a name from the college ranks that has now come up, according to a Chicago Tribune report, certainly wasn't on the radar of NFL coaching carousel pundits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: University City 61, Lincoln 59
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- What a game on the hardwood at University City in boys action with the Centurions beating Lincoln in double overtime 61-59. Dylan Griffin paced the Centurions with a game high 38 points.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Canyon Hills 47, Crawford 39
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys basketball on Tuesday night at Crawford with the Colts hosting Canyon Hills. Rattlers win a very competitive defensive battle 47-39.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Former Baltimore Orioles left-hander Brian Matusz, who made final MLB appearance with Cubs in 2016, dies at 37
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Brian Matusz, the left-handed pitcher who spent eight seasons in the major leagues and made his final big-league appearance with the Cubs during their 2016 World Series championship season, has died. He was 37. Matusz, a former No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Athletics agree to $60M, 5-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, AP source says
item.description: (AP) -- The Athletics have agreed to a $60 million, five-year contract with slugger Brent Rooker, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Monday night. The person spoke on condition of anonymity because the agreement had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers stars reflect on how season badly derailed
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- As the San Francisco 49ers packed up their lockers at Levi's Stadium on Monday, players told reporters about how they will move forward into next season. Tight end George Kittle summed up the season as "disappointing.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Allstate CEO criticized for comments following New Orleans attack
item.description: NewsNation media contributor Colby Hall believes Wilson's intentions behind his message were good but says it was ultimately "tone deaf.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Zuckerberg taps UFC President Dana White for Meta's board of directors
item.description: (KRON) -- Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg rings in the new year with several major personnel announcements. Three high-profile individuals have been named to join Meta's board of directors, including one of the most prominent figures in sports.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
